creator: ibex@physik.TU-Berlin.DE
text:
Hi!

Here it is. The long awaited apache13-php3-port 8-).

I put the initial version in

	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/apache-php3.0.2-1.3.0.tar.gz

(please don't use apache13-php3.tar.gz which is an older version)

This port is a cooperation between Stefan Herrmann
<stefan@asterix.webaffairs.net> and me (Dirk Froemberg
<ibex@physik.TU-Berlin.DE>). So please make sure to mention us both
in the commit.

	Best regards Dirk
